title: daemon store get_* methods issue one query per ID instead of WHERE id IN
description: All bulk-fetch store methods (get_message, get_contact, get_space, etc.) loop over IDs and issue one SELECT per ID rather than a single SELECT WHERE id IN (...) query. For JMAP /get requests with many IDs this produces O(N) SQL round-trips. Fix: replace the per-ID loops with parameterized IN-list queries, batched if necessary for SQLite's variable limit.
